debug_info.goal:
α : Type
hα : OracleComp.SampleableType α
n : ℕ
hn : NeZero n
x : Fin n
⊢ x ∈ support (⋯ ▸ OracleComp.uniformSample (Fin (n - 1 + 1)) (OracleComp.instSampleableTypeFinHAddNatOfNat (n - 1)))

failed_attempts:
simpa using (SampleableType.mem_support_selectElem (β := Fin (n - 1 + 1))
      (x := (Eq.ndrec x (congr_arg Fin (Nat.succ_pred (NeZero.ne n)).symm))))
  probOutput_selectElem x := by sorry --rw [mem_support_eqRec_iff]; simp

simpa using (SampleableType.mem_support_selectElem (β := Fin (n - 1 + 1)) (x := x))
  probOutput_selectElem_eq x y := by sorry --rw [mem_support_eqRec_iff]; simp

simpa using (SampleableType.mem_support_selectElem (β := Fin (n - 1 + 1))
      (h := OracleComp.instSampleableTypeFinHAddNatOfNat (n - 1))
      (cast (congr_arg Fin (Nat.succ_pred (NeZero.ne n)).symm) x))
  probOutput_selectElem_eq x y := by sorry --rw [mem_support_eqRec_iff]; simp

rw [mem_support_eqRec_iff]
    simp [support_uniformSample]
  probOutput_selectElem_eq x y := by sorry --rw [mem_support_eqRec_iff]; simp

simpa [uniformSample] using

  probOutput_selectElem_eq x y := by sorry --rw [mem_support_eqRec_iff]; simp
